REQUIRED. List every issue this PR closes, one per line, using a GitHub
closing keyword so the issue auto-closes on merge.

Accepted keywords: Close / Closes / Closed / Fix / Fixes / Fixed /
Resolve / Resolves / Resolved.

Example:
  Closes #14
  Closes #15
  Fixes #28

If this PR legitimately closes no issues (typo, dep bump, docs-only),
delete this whole section AND make the very first line of this PR body
`[no-close]: <short justification>` to bypass the pr-closes-check gate.
